title: Extend OpenAiService.classify() with confidence field
task: Extend #buildCategorySchema() to add confidence: { type: 'number', minimum: 0, maximum: 1 } to properties and required array. Update classify() return shape to include confidence field. Update response mapping: UNKNOWN → confidence: 0, valid → confidence from parsed || 0.5, refusal → confidence: 0, parse failure → confidence: 0. Update #generatePrompt() with confidence scoring instructions.
acceptance: #buildCategorySchema() includes confidence: { type: 'number', minimum: 0, maximum: 1 } in properties
classify() return shape: { category, confidence, prompt, response }
UNKNOWN → { category: null, confidence: parsed.confidence || 0, response: 'UNKNOWN', prompt }
Valid enum → { category: parsed.category, confidence: parsed.confidence || 0.5, response, prompt }
Refusal → { category: null, confidence: 0, response: refusal, prompt }
Parse failure → { category: null, confidence: 0, response: rawContent, prompt } + console.warn
#generatePrompt() includes confidence scoring instructions (0.9–1.0 high, 0.6–0.8 moderate, 0.3–0.5 low, 0.0–0.2 very uncertain)
